channel.title: Tech on Taskin's site
channel.description: Recent content in Tech on Taskin's site

item.title: A half measure to treat NTFS errors
item.description: How do you correct when a drive is corrupted? Simply go to drive Properties, from Tools tab select the option to scan for errors and then use the dialogue that comes up if any error is found or, better yet, find the dialogue through your desktop notifications when you plug in your disk. But these are simply not possible on a Linux-based system if your filesystem of choice is NTFS.

item.title: Hoping for a clearer tomorrow
item.description: It has been more than half a decade since Apple decided to let go of the headphone jack from their phones and then (most) other major smartphone manufacturers followed suit. And while Sony phones and the more relatively recently launched Asus Zenfone 9 device still feature it and most lower-end phones still have it, Google decided to do away with it even on Pixel A series not too long after releasing this ad.
